ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator for the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, interventional) */,
  "study_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the study (e.g., phase 1, phase 2, phase 3) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., randomized, non-randomized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covariates" (
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covariate */,
  "covariate_name" TEXT /* Name of the covariate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the covariate */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the covariate (e.g., drug exposure, procedure, age group) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the covariate */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the covariate (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covariate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical concept */,
  "concept_type" TEXT /* Type of the medical concept (e.g., condition, drug, procedure) */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain (e.g., clinical, demographic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_covariates" (
  "patient_covariate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-covariate association */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the covariate */,
  "covariate_value" REAL /* Value of the covariate for the patient */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the covariate was measured */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., EHR, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_covariate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_covariates_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_covariates_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_covariates_covariate_id FOREIGN KEY ("covariate_id") REFERENCES covariates ("covariate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_exposures" (
  "drug_exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug exposure */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "drug_concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the drug exposure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the drug exposure */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the drug */,
  "dose_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dose (e.g., milligrams, grams) */,
  "refill_count" INTEGER /* Number of refills */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_exposures_drug_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_exposures_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "procedure_concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procedure concept */,
  "procedure_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure was performed */,
  "procedure_type" TEXT /* Type of the procedure (e.g., surgery, education) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who performed the procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_procedure_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages for the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., patient, study, dataset) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the study site */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the study site */,
  "site_city" TEXT /* City of the study site */,
  "site_state" TEXT /* State of the study site */,
  "site_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the study site */,
  "site_country" TEXT /* Country of the study site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_site_investigators" (
  "site_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site investigator */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study site */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "investigator_title" TEXT /* Title of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_investigators_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES study_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_investigators_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_site_patient_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient enrollment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study site */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was enrolled */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_patient_enrollments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES study_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_patient_enrollments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
